mapper.sql: id, name, icon, path, component, parent_id, target, permission, type, status, hide, note, sort, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time, del_flag
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu AS m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu AS rm ON m.id=rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role AS ur ON ur.role_id=rm.role_id WHERE ur.user_id=#{userId} AND m.type = 0 AND m.parent_id=#{parentId} AND m.status=0 AND m.hide=0 AND m.del_flag=0 AND ur.del_flag=0 AND rm.del_flag=0 ORDER BY m.sort ASC;

SELECT DISTINCT m.permission FROM sys_menu AS m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu AS rm ON m.id=rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role AS ur ON ur.role_id=rm.role_id WHERE ur.user_id=#{userId} AND m.type=1 AND m.status=0 AND m.del_flag=0 AND ur.del_flag=0 AND rm.del_flag=0
